payload.title: Pairing flow: `scope pair` + CSR endpoint
payload.description:
New CLI command `scope pair` shows a short human-friendly code (e.g. 6-digit or 4-word) and optionally a QR encoding {url, ca_fingerprint, code}. New endpoint POST /api/pair accepts {code, csr_pem, device_name}: validates the code (single-use, 5min TTL, constant-time compare), signs the CSR with the local CA, returns the client cert + CA cert.

Acceptance:
- `scope pair` blocks until a device pairs or times out (default 5min)
- /api/pair is rate-limited (e.g. 5 attempts then back off)
- Pairing records persisted: device name, cert serial, paired_at, last_seen — to ~/.scope-hub/devices.json
- `scope devices list` shows paired devices

Depends on the CA story.
